hints.text: Visible **pickup truck** in most coverage (cab + bed; colours vary; Gen3 has a roof rack; sometimes one huge blur)
A **police follow car** (mostly white or black) almost always trails the Street View car
**Short plates** looking somewhat **green** through the blur
Concrete poles w/ **indents + a few horizontal supports** — like Brazil's but w/o holes through them

shared_with.note: Brazilian ladder poles have holes through the pole.
shared_with.diff: No holes → Nigeria; context obvious anyway.

hints.text: Roads often **lineless, faded, potholed or unpaved**
Single-storey houses w/ **steeply pitched metal-sheet roofs** + cinder-block compound walls
**City & state names on storefronts/banners** — learn the states!
**Shitcam** (official Ari) — the only mainland-African country with it; the 2023–25 batch is EXTRA low quality (huge cars through the blur — elsewhere only Lebanon)
hints.uniq_note: African shitcam = Nigeria (Madeira/Ecuador have it on other continents).

shared_with.note: Madeira also has shitcam coverage (its own gloomy wide-blur variant).
shared_with.diff: Continent decides instantly — African setting → Nigeria.

shared_with.note: Ecuador also has shitcam, with a distinct red logo at the front.
shared_with.diff: Continent decides instantly — African setting → Nigeria.

hints.text: Mostly flat w/ subtle changes: hills in Enugu + Ife↔Lokoja (south), more from Abuja→Jimeta (north), biggest = **Mandara range** on the Cameroon border; climate: tropical rainforest south (palms + lush) → savanna centre → arid steppe far north (seasons distort!)
Coverage sparse (mostly cities + connecting highways); **Gen3 never north of Abuja**; Gen4 not in the NW or far south; shitcam nearly everywhere (maps)
**State vehicle colours**: several states have unique taxi/tuk-tuk paint jobs (map; vehicle shown = yellow tuk-tuks in that state)
**Christian south / Muslim north** — hijabs + Muslim attire more common northward

bullets: Kaduna: these haystacks are almost exclusive to the state
Kano: arid-but-green farmland full of corn — shitcam ONLY
Benue: lush green grass + reddish soil + scattered tall trees + thatched huts (palms → lean the southern neighbours)
Niger state: the shitcam version of Benue — scattered trees, red soil, dry grass
Kebbi/Sokoto/Zamfara/Katsina (NW): even more open & arid, few/no trees, shitcam only
Plateau/Bauchi/Gombe/Adamawa/N-Taraba: savanna + rocky hills (clay-soil hills near Gombe)

hints.text: **Spotlights**: east of Lekki = flat sandy coast + palms, old Gen3 w/ silver follow car; A121 = divided highway w/ short concrete median + lush vegetation + trucks (A232 east of Benin City: wider median); A3 east of Potiskum = Gen4, open arid, divided; dark red soil → Benin City & Enugu; **Obudu Plateau road** = Nigeria's tallest covered mountains, winding, foggy & wet; blue-tinted shitcam in mapped areas; old Gen3 follow-car map (silver Lexus rarely Onitsha↔Enugu)
